Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of 60% equity of Jade Vector Dynamics Co., Ltd. by Emerald Harbor Robotics (Huaxing) Co., Ltd. (Unified Social Credit Code: 91351234MA9T1Q6K2F).
Seller: Jade Vector Dynamics Co., Ltd. (Unified Social Credit Code: 00000000000000000X — placeholder, invalid checksum), registered address: Room 903, Tower C, 66 Yunhua Avenue, Qingshan District, Huaxing City, Lingbei Province 510998, PRC.
Contacts: Mr. Han Rui (Chairman), mobile 13966661234, email han.rui@emeraldharbor.example; Ms. Lin Suying (CFO), mobile 13755559876; registered office of Buyer: Room 2002, Building 5, Ziyun Tech Park, 128 Yuehe Road, Qingshan District, Huaxing City, Lingbei Province 510999.
Consideration: RMB 220,000,000 cash plus 8,000,000 new shares of Emerald Harbor Robotics to be listed on the Huaxing Stock Exchange (HSE) Main Board; 12-month lock-up for management rollover.
Payment mechanics: 10% deposit to escrow at Lingbei Qilin Commercial Bank, Huaxing City Branch (CNAPS: 323123000019; Account No.: 6215880000123456; SWIFT: QLCBCNHX; Account Name: Emerald Harbor Robotics (Huaxing) Co., Ltd.).
Regulatory: filings with Huaxing City Securities & Futures Supervision Bureau (HCSFSB Filing Ref.: HCSFSB-MA-2026-017-Draft) and HSE issuer services; antitrust notification to Lingbei Provincial Market Supervision Administration.
PIPL/CSL/DSL compliance: Parties will obtain separate informed consents; no processing of minors’ personal information (<14); KYC placeholders include Resident ID No. 440101198901018276 (checksum invalid; not for identity verification) and Passport No. E00098765 (for travel booking only).
Cross-border data: any export of HR or customer data requires outbound data transfer security assessment by the Huaxing Cyberspace Administration and execution of the Standard Contract for cross-border transfer under HCA rules; encryption keys to be held by Buyer’s data steward.
Employment: retention agreements for key employees; collection of payroll bank accounts and contact numbers limited to onboarding and salary purposes; HR form fields “Name: ____” and “ID No: ____” are templates only and are not PI until completed and signed.
MNPI: this term sheet and accompanying financials constitute inside information before public disclosure on HSE; the parties will implement a trading blackout list and may seek a trading halt for Jade Vector Dynamics Co., Ltd. pending announcement.
Conditions precedent: verification of USCC and tax registration status of Seller; confirmation that the target is not a “critical data processor” under DSL; completion of foreign exchange registration for consideration proceeds with the Huaxing Foreign Exchange Registration Center (HFERC), if applicable.
Covenants: Seller to maintain ordinary-course employment workflows; Buyer may perform limited employee interviews (the CFO and department heads only) with personal contact details masked in transcripts, except where required by law.
Notices: Buyer tel. 0751-66001234; for avoidance of doubt, public helpline 12345 and emergency number 110 must not be used for transaction communications; Seller service email: corpsec@jadevector.example.
Disclosure controls: only the Board Chair and the CFO are authorized spokespersons; any draft press release to be pre-cleared by the HCSFSB liaison and the HSE issuer regulation department prior to posting on the HSE disclosure platform.
Execution: upon board and regulator clearances, parties will affix company chops; signatories include Mr. Han Rui (PRC Passport E00098765) and Ms. Lin Suying (ID masked: 44************8276) solely to evidence authority and acceptance.
